title: 12Pcs Dinosaur Balloons, 18-42in Dinosaur Birthday Decorations, Aluminum Foil Birthday Balloons for Boys Suitable For Baby Shower Supplie, Jungle Dino Theme, Party Supplies
features: Dinosaur Balloons Set: Includes 12 dinosaur-shaped balloons and 2 round balloons; The dinosaur balloons range from 46 to 106 cm in size, creating a vibrant and eye-catching display; Perfect for dinosaur birthday decorations and dinosaur party invitations

Aluminum Foil Material: Made from durable aluminum foil, these dinosaur balloons are lightweight yet sturdy; The material ensures long-lasting inflation, making them ideal for dinosaur balloon arch and jungle theme party decorations

Versatile Party Decorations: Suitable for various occasions such as dinosaur birthday parties, jungle theme parties, and kids' celebrations; The dinosaur balloons for kids add a fun and festive atmosphere to any event
Easy to Use: Simply inflate the dinosaur balloons with air or helium for a quick setup; The balloons are designed to hold their shape and float, making them hassle-free for dinosaur party decorations
Engaging Design: The dinosaur-shaped balloons feature detailed designs that captivate children's attention; These birthday balloons for boys and girls are a hit at any dinosaur-themed celebration
